detail.description:
Hero Wars: Alliance is a free-to-play game. Includes optional purchases and loot boxes with random rewards.

Lead legendary Heroes into battle! Crush enemies, defeat bosses, and rule Dominion.


The Archdemon has won. The Guardians have fallen, many now twisted by darkness. But hope remains — Aurora has broken free. Now it’s your turn to rise and bring the others back.

Hero Wars: Alliance is more than an RPG — it's a test of your strategy, timing, and leadership. Collect powerful heroes, upgrad
detail.releaseNotes:
Ancient magic shifts!

Don’t fear the darkness.
Phobos gets a new Relic.

Sharpen the edge.
New Talisman for Drayne is on the way!

Desert power rises.
Morrigan steps into the ancient sands with a new Skin and Skin+.

Time pays off.
Tempus gains a new Relic — and red gear to match.

Chaos heals.
Aidan gets a brand-new Blazing Skin!
